title: Richard Hoshino Khoury Story - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
text:
Richard Hoshino Khoury Story - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
All Khoury Stories
Meet Richard Hoshino
Khoury Faculty
Vancouver Campus
Whether he was helping the Canadian government catch drug traffickers or optimizing travel schedules for Japan’s top baseball league, Richard Hoshino has leveraged mathematics and computer science to help others accomplish their goals. Now at Khoury College, he’s doing the same for his students.
My mission statement for my entire career has been to help students discover their potential and purpose by transforming how they experience mathematics and computer science … and to make change on the issues they care about
Richard Hoshino, Associate Teaching Professor
Explore all Khoury Stories
